caption:
F1 after the first 2 round 

.
.
The 2026 Formula 1 season has begun with a dramatic shift in the competitive order following the introduction of revolutionary technical regulations. Two races into the 24-round calendar, Mercedes has emerged as the early force to beat, securing consecutive 1-2 finishes. 

Ferrari emerging as the primary threat to the early Mercedes dominance. After the first two rounds, the scarlet cars of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton are within striking distance of the lead, consistently challenging for podiums and applying pressure to the Silver Arrows.
#formula1 #f1memes #f1reels #racing #f1

caption:
Pole. Win. Fastest Lap.

kimi.antonelli picked up his first hat-trick in China, becoming the youngest driver in F1 history to do so! 🎩

If he had led the opening lap of the race, he would've also earned a Grand Slam, which includes all of the above, plus leading every lap of the race. He narrowly missed out, with Lewis Hamilton taking the lead on Lap 1! 🤏

#F1 #Formula1 #ChineseGP

caption:
The moment George stepped aside to let Kimi, Bono and Lewis have their family portrait 🥹

George Russell immediately spotted this, before Lewis returned the favour to let the Mercedes colleagues have their photo too!

caption:
Our season starts this week! 
Join us on Patreon on Tuesday, 3rd March, for a close look at all the details in our 2026 liveries. 

And on Youtube on Wednesday, 4th March for our season opener episode. (It’s the longest video we’ve ever made(/making, still working on it).

This marks the first major evolutionary upgrade for our characters since 2020. Excited for a new season!
